title: File backend has no path traversal guard or documentation
description: FileBackend::from_uri accepts paths with .. components without canonicalization. secretx://file/config/../../etc/passwd resolves to /etc/passwd at read time. No validation, no warning. Maintainer owns the CVE if a user takes URIs from untrusted config and the file backend is enabled. At minimum, document the security assumption (caller-trusted URIs only) prominently in the crate doc. Ideally, reject paths that contain .. components or canonicalize and verify the result is under an expected root.
